sections.paragraph:
Original: כּלח

Transliteration: kelach

Phonetic: keh'-lakh

BDB Definition:

Calah = "vigour"
  1. one of the most ancient cities of Assyria; maybe modern 'Nimrud' located at the confluence of the Tigris and Zab rivers

Origin: the same as H3624

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
